title: O Lord In Your Great Strength

verses.text: O Lord, in your great strength the king has joy abundantly; and he exults exceedingly in your great victory. What he desired within his heart you fully have supplied; what he requested with his lips; you never have denied.

With gifts, O Lord, you welcomed him, with blessings manifold; and you have placed upon his head A crown of purest gold. When he requested life from you, you life to him did give; such length of days you have to him: forever he will live.

Your victory has made him great, his glory does excel; with splendor and with majesty you have endowed him well. For you will ever set on him the blessings of your grace; and make him glad eternally with joy before your face.

The king upon the Lord relies; his confidence is sure; and through the love of God Most High, the king is kept secure. Your hand will search for enemies and find out all your foes, and all who harbor hate for you, your right hand will oppose.
